title: How to Set Up and Connect to the Company VPN
text:
Q: How do I set up and connect to the company VPN on Windows and macOS?
A: Windows: Step 1: Click on the Start menu and select 'Settings'. Step 2: Go to 'Network & Internet' and select 'VPN' from the left sidebar. Step 3: Click on 'Add a VPN connection'. Step 4: In the 'VPN provider' dropdown, select 'Windows (built-in)'. Step 5: Fill in the 'Connection name' (e.g., Company VPN) and 'Server name or address' (provided by IT). Step 6: Choose 'L2TP/IPsec with pre-shared key' as the VPN type and enter the pre-shared key (provided by IT). Step 7: Click 'Save'. Step 8: To connect, go back to the VPN settings, select your VPN, and click 'Connect'. macOS: Step 1: Click on the Apple menu and select 'System Preferences'. Step 2: Click on 'Network'. Step 3: Click the '+' button to add a new service. Step 4: In the 'Interface' dropdown, select 'VPN'. Step 5: Choose 'L2TP over IPsec' as the VPN type and enter a name for the connection (e.g., Company VPN). Step 6: Enter the 'Server Address' and 'Account Name' (provided by IT). Step 7: Click 'Authentication Settings' and enter the password and the pre-shared key (provided by IT). Step 8: Click 'OK', then 'Apply', and to connect, select the VPN from the list and click 'Connect'.
